title: Sea of LCL in EoE episode 5 reference
display_title: Sea of LCL in EoE episode 5 reference
wikitext:
[]: Sea of LCL in EoE = episode 5 reference?             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu Feb 28, 2008 5:08 am might have been mentioned before--I searched, but it's kind of hard to search for. You think the scene where Rei's sitting on Shinji in the sea of LCL, with her hand going through his chest, is meant to be a symbolic contrast to the hand-on-boob scene in episode 5? they don't bash you over the head with it, but I feel like the detail's there intentionally.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Thu Feb 28, 2008 8:29 am I always did sort of wonder about this. It does make sense, and I am inclined to agree with you.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Thu Feb 28, 2008 12:02 pm I disagree. What's point of that symbolism? You can't really claim it's recurring visual motif in series either I say it is there to make whole symbolic sex/fusion thing clearer (still not clear enough to stop idiots going "omg Shinji haz sex with Rei in eoe lollollol gughlagughlagughla"). When I watched EoE first time I didn't realize they were fused untill I saw Rei's hands. That's only unnatural element in their posture. And that unnaturalism is important to point out to clearly the symbolism (which apparently still isn't enough :sad: ) Sometimes hands are just hands

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu Feb 28, 2008 2:55 pm The point would be to emphasize their openness since they're almost the same being.

[]: Re: Sea of LCL in EoE = episode 5 reference?             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Feb 28, 2008 4:47 pm FallenTabris wrote: they don't bash you over the head with it

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu Feb 28, 2008 4:55 pm Well, Rebuild certainly bashes you over the head with the "this is a continuation" idea, even if it's done so deceptively (we don't really know yet).

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Thu Feb 28, 2008 4:57 pm FallenTabris wrote: You think the scene where Rei's sitting on Shinji in the sea of LCL, with her hand going through his chest, is meant to be a symbolic contrast to the hand-on-boob scene in episode 5? they don't bash you over the head with it, but I feel like the detail's there intentionally.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Thu Feb 28, 2008 5:06 pm I don't necessarily think every such event is Anno trying to tell something factually. I think much is done throughout the series by comparison/contrast. There's not really much more I can say about it, though--they're completely naked and unbound by any barriers, physical or social, both of which Shinji felt the barbs of in the scene of Manifold Panties.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Feb 28, 2008 5:50 pm Isn't that scene Rei/Lilith's way of showing Shinji that instrumentality can be a greater pleasure than sex? (Hint hint, "Do you want to become one with me, in mind and body, it'll be wonderful.")

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Feb 28, 2008 6:59 pm Shinji didn't seem that excitied about it. I don't think the 2 scenes are connected, they serve 2 different purposes, the one in instrumentality connotes the "merging" and "intimacy" of instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 01, 2008 8:09 pm This thread takes me way back... (BTW, Ornette, like the filenames on those. )

[]:             Quote Post by Machinehead » Thu Mar 06, 2008 10:54 pm I've never thought about this, but wow, I really like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 07, 2008 1:28 am Are you responding to the first post, or to my post (3/1)?

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Mar 07, 2008 10:04 am Reichu wrote: PIX

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Mar 07, 2008 11:28 am I never noticed Rei's hand going into his chest like that. If I had to say anything about these two shots, it would be that in the process of instrumentality, Shinji experiences the same emotions of embarrassment and discomfort as he did from episode 5. IE, way to close, personal space, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Logan Payne » Fri Mar 07, 2008 6:44 pm slothen wrote: I never noticed Rei's hand going into his chest like that. If I had to say anything about these two shots, it would be that in the process of instrumentality, Shinji experiences the same emotions of embarrassment and discomfort as he did from episode 5. IE, way to close, personal space, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 07, 2008 10:53 pm Two hands, actually. And watch! When she removes her right hand, it goes through Shinji's solar plexus! OH SHI-- (Anyone who recognizes that hand gesture from elsewhere in the movie also gets nerd points.)

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Sat Mar 08, 2008 4:33 am slothen wrote: I never noticed Rei's hand going into his chest like that. If I had to say anything about these two shots, it would be that in the process of instrumentality, Shinji experiences the same emotions of embarrassment and discomfort as he did from episode 5. IE, way to close, personal space, etc.
